title: Ancient Armory
description: Adds new Ancient Quartz and Ancient Tuff Armory, made for a CIV Event
body:
THE MOD IS COPYRIGHTED AS **ALL RIGHTS RESERVED**

THIS MOD IS STILL EXPERIMENTAL AND WAS MADE FOR A 100 PLAYER CIVILATION EVENT!!
THERE'S NO ORE GENERATION YET!
